title: Support
lead: Get general help with registration, bookings, payments, cancellations, disputes, and marketplace usage.
phaseCopy: Phase {phase} provides general support guidance only. It does not access live order, payment, or account-specific data.
accountAwareNotice: Support chat is available to guests and signed-in users through the same entry point. Account-aware answers are not available yet.
emptyThread: Ask a support question to start.
disclaimer: AI support may make mistakes. It cannot access live order, payment, or account data.
error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
handoffAccount: For account-specific help, contact support with your order, invoice, or account details.
handoffGeneral: If this does not answer your question, contact support for help.
